allow: PowerShell(python -c "from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont; print\('ok'\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell($paths = @\("/", "/mcp", "/sse", "/api", "/health", "/jsonrpc"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000$p" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "$p => $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "$p => $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($sessionId = "test-" + [System.Guid]::NewGuid\(\).ToString\("N"\).Substring\(0,8\); $body = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"claude-test","version":"1.0"}}}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/message?sessionId=d5436482-8520-4d46-ad82-f9320d8054ee" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 10 -ErrorAction Stop; $r.Content } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($req = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create\("http://127.0.0.1:3000/sse"\); $req.Method = "GET"; $req.Timeout = 5000; $resp = $req.GetResponse\(\); $stream = $resp.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $line1 = $reader.ReadLine\(\); $line2 = $reader.ReadLine\(\); $line3 = $reader.ReadLine\(\); Write-Output $line1; Write-Output $line2; Write-Output $line3; $sessionId = \($line2 -split "sessionId="\)[1]; Write-Output "SessionId: $sessionId"; $body = '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"claude-test","version":"1.0"}}}'; $msgResp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3000/message?sessionId=$sessionId" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "Response: $\($msgResp.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output $msgResp.Content; $reader.Close\(\); $resp.Close\(\))

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:7456" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; "Preview running: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Preview not accessible: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($req = [System.Net.HttpWebRequest]::Create\("http://127.0.0.1:7456"\); $req.Method = "GET"; $req.Timeout = 5000; try { $resp = $req.GetResponse\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $content = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $resp.Close\(\); "Preview OK - Status: $\($resp.StatusCode\), Content length: $\($content.Length\)" } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
